<!--
  Thanks for contributing to Pulse! 🎉
  Keep PRs focused — one logical change per PR is easiest to review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123". If there's no issue, briefly explain the motivation. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation only
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore / tooling

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran, configs you tried, screenshots for UI changes. -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manually verified (`npm run seed && npm run dev` and/or `npm run monitor:dry`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`).
- [ ] I updated relevant docs (`docs/`, `README.md`, or the example config).
- [ ] I did **not** commit any secrets, tokens, or `.env` files.
- [ ] New/changed config fields are reflected in `packages/shared/src/types.ts` and `config/pulse.config.example.yaml`.

## Screenshots / output

<!-- For dashboard or status-page changes, before/after screenshots help a lot. -->
